data.title: Global Association for the Attractions Industry Announces Postponement of IAAPA Expo Middle East
data.description: The IAAPA, a worldwide association for the attractions industry, has disclosed the postponement of the IAAPA Expo Middle East to the next year, as of March 13, 2026. This decision came after a meeting of the Association's Board of Directors to assess the current situation in the Middle East.

data.title: Oil prices increased despite Trump's move to lift Russian sanctions, surging 10% but only seeing a slight impact.
data.description: Following a 10% surge on Thursday, oil prices remained largely unaffected by President Trump's choice to exempt certain Russian crude sales from sanctions.

data.title: Europe Indoor Farming Market Set for Strong Growth, Projected to Hit USD 16.9 Billion by 2032 Amid Rising Demand for Sustainable Agriculture, Reports MarkNtel Advisors
data.description: A recent report by market research firm MarkNtel Advisors indicates that the Indoor Farming Market in Europe is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 6.63% from 2026 to 2032. This growth is mainly driven by the increasing popularity of indoor farming methods in the region.

data.title: Adobe, Buckle And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are trading with a mix, with investors on the lookout for potential movers in the market. Before the opening bell, Buckle Inc. (NYSE: BKE) is anticipated to announce quarterly earnings of $1.50 per share, with projected revenue of $396.44 million. In after-hours trading, Buckle shares saw a 0.5% increase, reaching $50.93. Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ: ADBE) recently disclosed strong financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026 after Thursday's market close. The company's first-quarter revenue stood at $6.40 billion, surpassing analysts' predictions of $6.28 billion. Additionally, Adobe reported adjusted earnings of $6.06 per share for the quarter, exceeding estimates of $5.87 per share. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: [MWC 2026] GlobalData Releases a White Paper on Voice Evolution in the AI Era
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 13, 2026, Andy Hicks, a Senior Principal Analyst for GlobalData, unveiled a white paper at MWC 2026 titled "Reinventing Voice: A Converged, AI-Enabled, and Multimodal Voice Core for the Next Generation of Telecommunications." The paper emphasizes the importance of a new approach to voice technology, combining AI, multimodal capabilities, and convergence within the telecommunications industry.

data.title: isinwheel Rolls Out Spring Initiatives Across Britain and Europe
data.description: In Berlin on March 13, 2026, isinwheel, a prominent player in electric mobility solutions, announced the commencement of its Spring Promotion on February 27 to coincide with the start of pre-sales for multiple new products as the spring travel season approaches. The promotion will run until April, offering customers exclusive deals and discounts on cutting-edge electric mobility solutions.

data.title: Senators Van Hollen, Warren, and Gallego to oversee DOJ probe into Binance to ensure a thorough investigation.
data.description: Chris Van Hollen, Elizabeth Warren, and Ruben Gallego, all senators, have pledged to push for a thorough investigation by the Justice Department into Binance.

data.title: SEMIFIVE Pulls Ahead in AI ASIC Market, Expanding Lead with Successive NPU Project Wins
data.description: SEMIFIVE, a global leader in high-performance ASIC market, has recently won a project worth KRW 18 billion for the development of their next-generation AI NPU. This success emphasizes their strong position in AI semiconductor design, showcasing their competitiveness by securing consecutive contracts for 4nm AI chips. The project marks a significant milestone for SEMIFIVE, underlining their continued dedication to innovation and advancement in the industry.
